Localization.Description: The MultiPotato tool is used to escalate privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} ran process {object.process.parent.name} to create pipe {object.storage.fullpath}, impersonate the user {object.account.name}, and, on behalf of the user, create process {alert.context} on host {event_src.host}

The user {subject.account.name} ran process {object.process.parent.name} to create pipe {object.storage.fullpath}, impersonate the user {object.account.name}, and, on behalf of the user, create the user {alert.context} on host {event_src.host}
